calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Request For Prove Up Hearing On Request For Entry Of Default And Defaultjudgmentand Request For Waiver Of Witness Requirement
Off Calendar Mar-24-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Phillip Seltzer, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Sonic Lab Audio Inc.
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Verboten Corp., Brooklyn Events, LLC, and Jennifer Schiffer.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:
Damages: $5,589.55
Pre-Judgment Interest: $315.39
Attorney's Fees: $10,165.00
Costs: $1027.76
Punitive Damages: $27,947.75
Total Judgment in the amount of $45,045.45

Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2015 Continued To Apr-05-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2015 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-05-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2015 Continued To Nov-04-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
